{{Quote|Instigator, this is Ree Shala. I have come to warn you of an impending attack on this planet by Mahk'khar.|Ree Shala warning New Republic ships of an attack|<ref name="Relic (article)">{{JournalCite|6|Relic (article)}}</ref>}}
'''Ree Shala''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who worked the majority of her life as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. She began by running spice, but after many unsuccessful ventures she established an operation where she was responsible for setting up deals, while others ran the space lanes. Through her hard work she was able to create a mid-sized smuggling ring based out of the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]].
